caption: A man is recorded in a studio setting, wearing a dark green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVADA SHIT" and a matching dark green baseball cap. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a black professional microphone on a boom arm. The background features a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a clothing rack with several garments. A white male mannequin wearing a white long-sleeved shirt stands behind him. Two logos are visible on screen: a circular black and white logo containing the word "RADIO" on the left and a red text logo reading "RADIO FREE" on the right. As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expression shifts from a neutral look to a slight smile and finally a broad grin, while his head tilts slightly. The background elements, including the mannequin and clothing, remain static throughout the scene.
